title: astragalus australis
intro: Astragalus australis, also known as the Australian milk-vetch, is a perennial legume native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus australis include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Astragalus australis can be prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
